narrative:
Lafayette (precinct in Allen County) has 226 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.1 percentage points.
